name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Wilmington, DE's TitleMax Title Loans at Kirkwood Hwy offers fast title loans with same-day funding and flexible payment options.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates a standalone storefront at 3401 Kirkwood Hwy in Wilmington, DE. This Wilmington location is conveniently situated for quick access to title loan services. The location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturdays from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays.

At this Wilmington, DE location, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral, with same-day approval and funding available for qualified applicants. The team can answer questions about loan amounts, repayment terms, and eligibility requirements. Call +1 302-993-7945 to speak with a representative or to ask about current rates.

For Wilmington residents needing quick cash, bring a valid government ID, proof of vehicle ownership (registration/title), proof of residency, and details about your vehicle to apply. Title loans can be processed quickly, often within hours of approval. TitleMax has been serving Delaware communities for years.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement at in-store locations
Accepts most credit types — vehicle title can substitute for strong credit score
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the loan term
Bilingual staff available at the Memphis Summer Avenue location
Offers unsecured line of credit in addition to secured title products
5.0/5 Google rating from 481+ verified customer reviews at this location
Memphis Summer Avenue store has been operating continuously since February 2007
cons: Requires a clear (lien-free) vehicle title — borrowers who still owe on their car do not qualify
Website does not disclose APR ranges, making cost comparison impossible before applying
Title loans carry repossession risk if the borrower defaults
Online unsecured line of credit restricted to only 11 states
Closed Sundays at this location, limiting same-day access over weekends
best_for: Borrowers with a paid-off vehicle who need fast cash and have poor or thin credit
Tennessee residents needing same-day emergency funds without a traditional bank option
Borrowers who want a revolving line of credit rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Spanish-speaking borrowers needing bilingual lending assistance
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for borrowers with a fully paid-off vehicle, urgent cash needs, and credit too weak for conventional lenders. The main caveat is cost: title loans are high-APR products and the website discloses no rate information, so borrowers should request the full APR in writing before signing and treat this as a last resort after exhausting lower-cost emergency options.
services: Unsecured personal line of credit (in-store and online)
Partial or lump-sum drawdowns on line of credit
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 3401 Kirkwood Hwy, Wilmington, DE. Fast title loans with same-day approval and flexible terms.
seo_title: TitleMax Title Loans in Wilmington, DE | CreditDoc
